page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web interface for generating hypotheses about gene function, analyzing gene lists and prioritizing genes for functional assays. Users input a query list for extension and weighting with functionally similar genes. Six organisms are supported.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Web interface for generating hypotheses about gene function, analyzing gene lists and prioritizing genes for functional assays. Users input a query list for extension and weighting with functionally similar genes. Six organisms are supported.
